title: Sensual Canadian Fatty Pastry
description: A rich and silky Canadian pastry dessert featuring cinnamon stick, perfect for diabetic-friendly treats.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper, leaving a 2-inch overhang for easy removal.
In a large bowl, whisk together the almond flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the softened butter and mix until the dough comes together, then cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch and cut into desired shapes using a pastry cutter or a knife.
Place the shapes on the prepared baking sheet, leaving about 1 inch of space between each cookie.
Bake for 18-20 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Allow the pastry to cool completely on the baking sheet.
In a small bowl, whisk together the heavy cream and vanilla extract, then drizzle over the cooled pastry.
Sprinkle with confectioners' sugar, if desired.
Cut into individual servings and serve immediately.
Store leftover pastry in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 3 days.
Freeze for up to 2 months, thawing frozen pastry at room temperature or in the refrigerator overnight before serving.
